_meta.purpose: Baseline allowlist for JA-91 (cross-pattern explanation_en similarity ≥ 0.85 Levenshtein). RESOLVED 2026-05-17 (Phase B) — all 43 prior baseline pairs addressed via explanation_en rewrites. JA-91 enforces the threshold unconditionally; baseline_pairs is empty and serves as a RESOLVED snapshot.

classification_legend.DUPLICATE_PATTERN: Two pattern IDs cover the same conceptual content (e.g., n5-014 + n5-039 both = これ/それ/あれ pronouns). Corpus-structural cleanup target for a future audit; current explanations legitimately share text.
classification_legend.CROSS_REFERENCE: One pattern is a cross-ref / 'see X' deferral (e.g., n5-048 どこ → n5-016 ここ/そこ/あそこ/どこ series). Explanation copy is intentional to keep each entry self-contained.
classification_legend.ALTERNATIVE_VARIANT: Patterns are formality / register / dialect variants of the same construct (e.g., 〜なくてはいけない / 〜なくてはならない / 〜ないといけない / 〜なくちゃ). Explanation text is shared by design; per-pattern register notes should appear in the deep_dive block, not the top-level explanation_en.
classification_legend.SUBSET: One pattern is a subset of another's coverage; the broader pattern's explanation applies.

_meta.authoring_note: Each pair below was hand-classified 2026-05-17 by reading the meaning_en + pattern + explanation_en of both members. The 43 pairs split as: DUPLICATE_PATTERN ×8, CROSS_REFERENCE ×21, ALTERNATIVE_VARIANT ×12, SUBSET ×2. Threshold for promotion FROM baseline (cleanup): a future audit cycle could (a) merge DUPLICATE_PATTERN pairs into single IDs, (b) replace CROSS_REFERENCE explanations with shorter 'see <pattern_id>' pointers + a deep_dive deep-link, (c) author per-variant register notes for ALTERNATIVE_VARIANT pairs. None of these are blocking; JA-91 captures the current state.

_audit_summary.next_review_trigger: RESOLVED 2026-05-17 (Phase B): all 43 prior baseline pairs addressed via explanation_en rewrites on the deferring (or both, for ALTERNATIVE_VARIANT) sides. JA-91 now enforces cross-pattern similarity unconditionally on the current corpus.
